description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and a compact, bullpup-style layout. The receiver and barrel assembly are integrated into a single, streamlined body, with a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail. The fore-end is angular and robust, with a visible under-barrel attachment or heat shield, and the barrel itself is long and cylindrical, extending well past the main body. The grip is ergonomic, with a thumbhole stock and a red accent on the magazine or grip base, enhancing its visual appeal. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the overall construction suggests a mix of metal and polymer materials. This shotgun is designed for urban tactical scenarios, offering both functionality and a visually striking appearance.
description: A modern, tactical bullpup shotgun with a matte black finish, optical sight, and ergonomic thumbhole stock. Features a long barrel, robust fore-end, and red-accented grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, optical sight, thumbhole stock, and red-accented grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's circular opening, optical sight alignment, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the barrel, sight, and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, sight, and the compact, streamlined body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with a vented or ribbed upper section
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with an elongated shape and smooth edges
